top_signals.title: Stocks Fall After Retail Sales Amid AI Trade Angst: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A renewed selloff in chipmakers dragged down stocks on concerns over whether massive artificial-intelligence investments will justify lofty valuations, with the market extending losses after retail sales data.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US Jobless Claims Decline to 208,000, Below Economist Forecasts
top_signals.summary: Applications for US unemployment benefits fell last week, suggesting the labor market remains stable.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Toast the City Awards 2026 finalists announced – vote now!
top_signals.summary: It’s here: the Toast the City Finalists have been announced, with bars, restaurants, coffee shops, green spaces and more from across the City being celebrated in the Square Mile’s biggest and best awards. Now is your chance to vote for your favourite city spots – just visit our Toast the City website and cast your [...]

top_signals.title: Tokenized stocks market cap gains to record $2.3B
top_signals.summary: The market capitalization of tokenized stocks rose to a record $2.3 billion, as investors sought exposure to the growing list of tokenized equity products launched by cryptocurrency exchanges.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
